close_reason: No change needed: all format!() calls include interpolated variables, static messages already use literal.into()
description:
secretx-core/src/lib.rs throughout the JSON scanner: every error path calls format!("...") to build the message. On the happy path these never run, but the fact that there are ~30 distinct format!() sites with the same DecodeFailed wrapper hints that a structured error variant (avkc.3) would also reduce string-formatting noise.

Once avkc.3 lands (DecodeFailed { reason: DecodeReason, detail: ... }), most of these format! calls collapse into 'DecodeFailed { reason: DecodeReason::UnexpectedChar { expected, got, position } }'. The Display impl for DecodeReason centralizes the message format so all error sites share consistent wording.

This is filed as P2 elegance/idiom because it's a refactor that follows from avkc.3, not a separate concern. Bundle work with avkc.3.
title: Error variants throughout JSON scanners eagerly format error messages
